label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure this out. So there are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored present. Let me first note down who has what initially. Initial assignments: - Alice: green - Bob: purple - Claire: blue - Dave: black - Eve: red Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go step by step through each swap and track who has which present. Maybe I can keep a table or just track each person's gift after each swap. First swap: Dave and Claire swap. So Dave originally had the black ball, Claire had blue. After swapping, Dave has blue and Claire has black. Let me note that. After first swap (Dave & Claire): - Alice: green - Bob: purple - Claire: black - Dave: blue - Eve: red Second swap: Bob and Alice swap. Bob had purple, Alice had green. After swapping, Bob has green and Alice has purple. After second swap (Bob & Alice): - Alice: purple - Bob: green
